Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.toonation

Class ToonationChat

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.toonation.ToonationChat
All Implemented Interfaces:
PlatformChat
public class ToonationChat extends Object implements PlatformChat
WebSocket client for Toonation donation alerts.

Toonation provides donation events only and does not provide chat messages.

Since:
1.0.0

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    close()
    Closes the current connection and blocks until completion.
